description: Stable fight identifier used to join fight_stats.
Date the fight occurred in YYYY-MM-DD or parseable date format.
First fighter name exactly as used across files.
Second fighter name exactly as used across files.
Winner name; must match fighter_a or fighter_b for completed fights.
Result method such as KO/TKO Submission Decision - Unanimous.
Clock time in finish round such as 5:00.
1 if either fighter missed weight else 0.
